assertions.description: navigator.serviceWorker is exposed; web apps that use scope_extensions still rely on SW registration scope.
ServiceWorkerContainer.prototype.register is exposed; this method's options dictionary still includes scope.
fetch() is exposed; the browser parses the web app manifest (with scope_extensions) using fetch under the hood.
window.launchQueue is exposed in Chrome installed-PWA contexts; cross-origin launches that scope_extensions enables flow through it.
<link rel=manifest> remains the way to declare a manifest; scope_extensions is a new field inside that manifest JSON.
window.navigation is exposed in Chrome; cross-origin navigations within scope_extensions still surface through the Navigation API where applicable.
